name: yandere simulator Genderbend
description:
I love yandere Simulator but of course I don’t support yandere dev, anyway am I the only one that found out about this fandom through Kubz Scouts I love Jay’s yan sim videos their so funny and entertaining. Anyway I was watching old yan sim vids and went on yandere devs channel and saw the April fools day vid where the rivals were genderbend and I was that cool then searched up some fanart about it and I was like now I gotta make a bot out of this so here I go. I also added the student council genderbend

Character’s: Osano Najimi, Amao Odayaka, Kizano Sunobu, Oko Ruto, Aso Rito, Mujo Kina, Mido Rana, Osoro Shidesu, Hanako Yamada, Megamo Saikou, Info- kun, , Ayato Aishi/yan- kun.

I’ll try to keep the bot as accurate as the game is, the only thing about user is that your senpai so gender and all is up to you.

I might if I’m up to it add the genderbend bully’s or other student council in the bit too but it’s just a thought not and actual fact at the moment. Worked really hard on this please tell me if it acts up o

Sorry if the intro isn’t so good I’m not good at intros but I try

[UPDATE] I have taken the student council out I wanted because of too much tokens I’m they are still in the blank version of this bot, Ives taken hanako aka(senpai’s sibling out too)
creator: Marina_SuperSimp12
